title: Rich American Lettuce Salad
description: A rich and creamy little gem lettuce salad that is a crowd-pleaser and suitable for those on low-sodium diets.

ingredients.name: Buttercream
ingredients.notes: Use a mild flavored butter like unsalted or low-fat

ingredients.name: Heavy Cream
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's cold for best texture

ingredients.name: Red Onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Chop until translucent to avoid bitter taste

ingredients.name: Garlic Clove, minced
ingredients.notes: Optional for additional depth of flavor

instructions: Gently massage the Little Gem Lettuce with a little bit of olive oil to enhance its flavors and textures.
In a mixing bowl, combine the chopped onions, chopped fresh dill, minced garlic (if using), and low-sodium soy sauce. Mix well until fully combined.
Slowly pour in heavy cream into the onion mixture while continuously whisking with a hand mixer or beaters on medium speed to emulsify the ingredients.
Add buttercream gradually to the cream mixture and continue mixing until creamy consistency is achieved, ensuring no lumps remain.

Fold the emulsified buttercream mixture gently through the lettuce using a large spoon. Aim for a uniform blend throughout each lettuce leaf to prevent over-mixing which can cause the salad to become soggy.
Place the dressed lettuce into a serving dish and garnish with additional fresh dill if desired before serving.
